payload.answer: No-op. The same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so only the first delivery should be considered. Do not create a second memory card for "Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans."
citations: Same Slack event ID delivered twice
Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans

entity_resolution.reason: Duplicate Slack event delivery should be handled idempotently; no new entity resolution or memory write is warranted from the retry alone.

details: Detected duplicate delivery semantics from the input.
Chose idempotent no-op to avoid duplicate durable memory.
Preserved ambiguity by not asserting a new current fact from a retry event alone.

repair_options: Accept the first-seen Slack event ID and ignore subsequent retries with the same ID.
If prior processing status is unknown, check the event log/store before writing any memory.
If the original event was never successfully committed, replay it once rather than creating duplicate memories.
